name: Pingidentity Accounts Never Used After Provisioning
description: Detects active pingidentity accounts older than 30 days with no successful login recorded.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM pingidentity_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.enabled, true) = true AND u.last_sign_on IS NULL AND u.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Remove or disable unused accounts and confirm provisioning flows are not creating unnecessary access.
